name: Greater Baltimore
author: rslurry
description:
```markdown
Uses 2023 LODES data for the greater Baltimore area.
Includes demand for BWI and MTN airports; JHU's various campuses, Morgan State, UMB, UMBC, UMCP, Loyola, US Naval Academy, Bowie State, and Towson universities; the National Aquarium, Camden Yards, and M&T Bank Stadium.
```
